scripts.db:migrations:apply: wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --remote --config wrangler.toml
scripts.deploy: pnpm build && pnpm db:migrations:apply && wrangler deploy --config wrangler.toml
scripts.deploy:d1-only: pnpm build && pnpm db:migrations:apply && wrangler deploy --config wrangler.toml

DB.description: ME3's private database. Keep the generated database ID in your copied repository so Core updates reuse the same data.

SITE_ASSETS.description: Private file storage for site media, mailbox attachments, and generated assets. The default name can stay as-is unless you run multiple ME3 installs in one Cloudflare account.

ME3_USER_AGENT.description: Durable Object state for ME3's owner agent runtime. Cloudflare provisions this automatically.

AI.description: Workers AI binding used by ME3's default assistant and voice features. You can add other model providers inside ME3 later.
